contexts.name: Improve Onboarding
contexts.brief:
Redesign the onboarding flow to reduce drop-off in the first 3 steps. Current completion rate is 42%. Target: 70%.

Key constraint: no engineering changes in steps 1–2, only copy and visual changes allowed until Q3.

tasks.name: Analyze drop-off heatmaps for steps 1–3
Interview 3 users who churned in step 2
Write 3 copy variants for step 2
A/B test copy variants — 100 user sample

decisions.text: Focus on step 2 first — analytics show 60% of drop-off happens there

sessions.summary: Analyzed drop-off data, identified step 2 as primary failure point

contexts.name: User Support 2.0
contexts.brief:
Rebuild the help center with AI-assisted support routing. Reduce avg response time from 4h to <30min.

Must integrate with existing Zendesk setup. No rip-and-replace.

tasks.name: Map current Zendesk support flow end-to-end
Identify top 10 recurring ticket categories
Define AI routing rules with support team

contexts.name: New Social Assets
contexts.brief: Create a refreshed visual identity for social media. Align with new brand direction from the website redesign project.

tasks.name: Gather brand reference material and mood references
Create 3 moodboard directions in Figma
Present moodboards to stakeholders
Produce asset templates for IG + LinkedIn

sessions.summary: Generated three moodboard directions for brand alignment review

contexts.name: Improve Contrast
contexts.brief: Fix all WCAG AA contrast failures across the app. 23 components identified in audit. Must ship before the accessibility review scheduled for mid-May.

tasks.name: Full component contrast audit — 23 failures logged
Draft updated semantic color token set
Update all 23 failing components in Figma
QA against WCAG AA checker before dev handoff

decisions.text: Use semantic token naming (color-text-primary) not role-based (color-grey-700)
Prioritize interactive elements first — buttons, links, form labels

sessions.summary: Full component audit — 23 failures cataloged with WCAG scores
Drafted updated semantic color token set for AA compliance

contexts.name: New Overview Screen
contexts.brief:
Design a new dashboard overview screen. Primary user goal: see all active projects at a glance without scrolling.

Designit benchmark showed grid layout outperforms list 3:1 on task completion.

tasks.name: Competitive analysis — 5 comparable products
Low-fi wireframes for grid + list variants
Stakeholder review and sign-off on direction
Hi-fi design pass — grid layout

decisions.text: Go with 2-column grid, not list — backed by competitive research

sessions.summary: Created low-fi wireframes for grid and list variants, presented to team

contexts.name: Website Redesign
contexts.brief:
Full redesign of the ACME marketing website. Goal: increase trial conversion from 2.1% to 4%, modernize visual identity, improve mobile experience.

Key pages: Home, Product, Pricing, Blog. Figma frames handed off to dev. Currently in build phase.

tasks.name: Hi-fi design — all 4 key pages
Dev handoff notes + token documentation
Implement Home page
Implement Product + Pricing pages
Mobile QA + cross-browser testing

decisions.text: Dark hero section with green CTA — approved by stakeholders

sessions.summary: Completed hi-fi design for all key pages, ready for stakeholder review
Wrote detailed dev handoff notes covering spacing, tokens, and component states
